title: DEEPSYNTH Leaderboard Submission
description: Schema for a single submission to the DEEPSYNTH benchmark leaderboard at https://huggingface.co/spaces/DeepSynthesisTeam/deepsynth-leaderboard.

schema_version.description: Version of this submission schema. Must match the current release.

agent_name.description: Display name shown on the leaderboard (e.g. 'ReAct-GPT5', 'DeepSynth-Planner-v2').

scaffold.description: Agent scaffold type. Use 'none' for vanilla LLM calls with no agent loop. Use 'Custom' only if none of the standard options fit, and describe it in scaffold_notes.

scaffold_notes.description: Optional short description of the scaffold; required if scaffold == 'Custom'.

category.description: Optional. LLM Baseline = no tools + no scaffold. Agent Framework = tool-using agent. Submission = external (default).

access.description: Whether the base model weights are publicly released. Rendered on the leaderboard as a 🔒/🔓 badge.

tools_used.description: Tools the agent had access to during evaluation. Empty array for vanilla LLM baselines.

tools_notes.description: Optional clarification (e.g. specific search provider, browser version, API variant).

contact_email.description: Contact for questions or retraction requests. Not displayed publicly on the leaderboard.

paper_url.description: Optional link to a paper or technical report describing the method.

code_url.description: Public URL to the code that produced these predictions. Required for leaderboard acceptance.

submission_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when predictions were generated.

split.description: Which split was evaluated. Dev = 40 public tasks (scored locally). Test = 80 held-out tasks (scored by maintainers). Full = all 120.

num_seeds.description: Number of independent runs averaged to produce these predictions. Minimum 1.

uses_external_retrieval.description: Whether the agent used live external retrieval (web, APIs) during inference.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes. Shown on the leaderboard detail view.

predictions.description: Map from task ID (zero-padded 3-digit string) to the agent's answer. Test set IDs are 001-080; dev set IDs are 001-040.

answer.description: The agent's answer for this task. Format follows DEEPSYNTH task-specific schema (see intermediate_answers_schemas/ in the HF dataset).

cost_usd.description: Optional: estimated USD cost to produce this answer (API + compute).

latency_s.description: Optional: wall-clock seconds to produce this answer.

num_tool_calls.description: Optional: total tool invocations made while solving this task.

num_tokens_input.description: Optional: total input tokens consumed across all LLM calls for this task.

num_tokens_output.description: Optional: total output tokens produced across all LLM calls for this task.

trace_url.description: Optional: link to a full trace (LangSmith, Weights & Biases, etc.) for this task. Useful for spot-check verification.
